title: Sportowa paczka by e__s
description: A lightweight 16x PvP texture pack optimized for performance and clarity on 1.19.2-1.21.4 Optifine
body:
Sport Pack 16x - Clean PvP
this pack is  for better visibility and a cleaner look during combat. It's simple, lightweight, and perfect for anyone who wants a more responsive experience.

🛠️ What’s inside:
16x16 Textures: Simple, clean textures that look great and keep things smooth.

Short Swords: Smaller sword models so you can see more of the battlefield.

Low Fire: Reduced fire height so it doesn't block your view when you're burning.

Clear GUI: Transparent menus and inventory – you can see your surroundings even while looting.

Optimized Particles: Clean particles that don't clutter your screen during a fight.

🚀 Who is it for?
Perfect for BoxPvP, BedWars, or any competitive mode where clarity matters. Tested and working on 1.21.4.

Works best with Optifine.
